1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Trondheim municipality

2.description: get teig parcels filtered by Trondheim kommunenummer

3.description: get quick-clay mapping polygons (kartleggingsomrade) national layer

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to Trondheim extent

5.description: find teig parcels that intersect the reduced quick-clay polygons

6.description: collapse to unique teigid per parcel

8.description: return top 10 parcels by teigid ascending
